title: Walensee Rotary Cultivator Tool, Adjustable Garden Hand Tiller with Stainless Steel Pole, 2-in-1 Garden Weeder and Crumbler Soil Cultivator Tool for Soil Mixing or Reseeding Grass
features: 【Rotary hand garden cultivator】: Featuring a unique star-shaped head, Walensee Garden Cultivator Tool employs a distinctive rolling mechanism, making it an exceptionally practical handheld tool for gardening enthusiasts. The rotating cutter head is composed of 4 interlocking gears, each containing 9 teeth, making soil breaking more effective. With the aid of four uniquely designed star-shaped wheels, the soil is processed to achieve an exceptionally fine degree of crumbling.

【Unique weeding design】: The additional weeder which allows simultaneous weeding, is made of manganese steel with hardened treatment. It undergoes electrophoretic processing on the surface, making it more long-lasting. Moever, the action hoe of blade's limiting piece is flexible, allowing for a greater degree of angle in performing digging and weeding. This combination of functions not only simplifies the task but also elevates its efficiency, offering a comfortable gardening experience.

【Adjustiable length & High quality】: With adjustable handle, you are able to customize its length according to your needs. The handle is made of rubber and designed ergonomically to mitigate hand strain during prolonged use. The large, stable grip ensures comfort, allowing you to work on breaking up the soil for extended periods without discomfort. Durable stainless steel pole makes it scorrosion-proof and rust-resistant. In addition, plastic sleeve is designed to increase its sturdiness.

【Multiple use & easy to install】: The 2-in-1 hand-held tiller is an excellent choice for the majority of tasks involved in garden maintenance, yard care, and lawn management. It excels at decompressing hardened earth, pulling weeds, and replanting on bare patches. Utilize this tool for aerating the ground, breaking down soil lumps, and planting seeds. The garden tool comes with instructions. With the guide of the instructions , you can assemble it easily.

【100% Satisfaction and guarantee】: If you have any questions or concerns about our rotary garden cultivator, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are always here to provide professional solution for you. We stand behind our products with a 100% satisfaction . If you are not completely satisfied with our soil cultivator, you'll get every penny refunded to you, no questions asked. We strive to ensure that every customer has a positive shopping experience. Thanks for choosing Walensee.
